title: Terramity x Enchantment Descriptions
body:
This resource pack adds compatibility between [Terramity](https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity) and [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions). Specifically, it enables Enchantment Descriptions to display descriptions for Terramity’s enchantments.

All descriptions are adapted from Terramity’s in-game guidebook, with minor modifications for clarity and consistency.
